lineage.Process: CreateFeatureclass C:\Users\lenovo\Desktop\王金玉\海北附表2.3\祁连县隐患要素分布数据 祁连县隐患要素分布断面线 折线 # 否 否 "PROJCS["CGCS2000_3_Degree_GK_CM_99E",GEOGCS["GCS_China_Geodetic_Coordinate_System_2000",DATUM["D_China_2000",SPHEROID["CGCS2000",6378137.0,298.257222101]],PRIMEM["Greenwich",0.0],UNIT["Degree",0.0174532925199433]],PROJECTION["Gauss_Kruger"],PARAMETER["False_Easting",500000.0],PARAMETER["False_Northing",0.0],PARAMETER["Central_Meridian",99.0],PARAMETER["Scale_Factor",1.0],PARAMETER["Latitude_Of_Origin",0.0],UNIT["Meter",1.0]];-5123200 -10002100 450265407.001579;-100000 10000;-100000 10000;0.001;0.001;0.001;IsHighPrecision" # 0 0 0 # 与模板相同
